fsymId.description: FactSet Entity Identifier by default, otherwise returns FactSet Regional Identifier. This is a six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with an -E suffix (XXXXXX-E).

date.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD for the classification record from GICS Direct

gicsSectorName.description: GICS Sector Name in Proper Format.

gicsIndustryGroupName.description: GICS Industry Group Name in Proper Format.

gicsIndustryName.description: GICS Industry Name in Proper Format.

gicsSubIndustryName.description: GICS Sub-Industry Name in Proper Format.
